info.title: LambdaSharp (λ#) Tool
info.description: Serverless .NET for AWS - Command Line Tool

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create or update a LambdaSharp deployment tier

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --protect
options.description: (optional) Enable termination protection for the CloudFormation stack

options.name: --xray
options.description: (optional) Enable service-call tracing with AWS X-Ray for all resources in module  (0=Disabled, 1=RootModule, 2=AllModules; RootModule if LEVEL is omitted)

options.name: --version
options.description: (optional) Specify version for LambdaSharp.Core module (default: same as CLI version)

options.name: --parameters
options.description: (optional) Specify source filename for module parameters (default: none)

options.name: --force-deploy
options.description: (optional) Force module deployment

options.name: --quick-start
options.description: (optional, create-only) Use safe defaults for quickly setting up a LambdaSharp deployment tier.

options.name: --core-services
options.description: (optional, create-only) Select if LambdaSharp.Core services should be enabled or not (either Enabled or Disabled, default prompts)

options.name: --existing-s3-bucket-name
options.description: (optional, create-only) Existing S3 bucket name for module deployments (blank value creates new bucket)

options.name: --local
options.description: (optional) Provide a path to a local check-out of the LambdaSharp modules (default: LAMBDASHARP environment variable)

options.name: --use-published
options.description: (optional) Force the init command to use the published LambdaSharp modules

options.name: --prompt-all
options.description: (optional) Prompt for all missing parameters values (default: only prompt for missing parameters with no default value)

options.name: --allow-upgrade
options.description: (optional) Allow upgrading LambdaSharp.Core across major releases (default: prompt)

options.name: --skip-apigateway-check
options.description: (optional) Skip API Gateway role check

options.name: --tier
options.description: (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)

options.name: --aws-profile
options.description: (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file

options.name: --aws-region
options.description: (optional) Use a specific AWS region (default: read from AWS profile)

options.name: --aws-account-id
options.description: (test only) Override AWS account Id (default: read from AWS profile)

options.name: --aws-user-arn
options.description: (test only) Override AWS user ARN (default: read from AWS profile)

options.name: --cli-version
options.description: (test only) LambdaSharp CLI version for profile

options.name: --deployment-bucket-name
options.description: (test only) S3 Bucket name used to deploy modules (default: read from LambdaSharp CLI configuration)

options.name: --tier-version
options.description: (test only) LambdaSharp tier version (default: read from deployment tier)

options.name: --prompts-as-errors
options.description: (optional) Missing parameters cause an error instead of a prompts (use for CI/CD to avoid unattended prompts)

options.name: --no-ansi
options.description: (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output

options.name: --verbose
options.description: (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)

options.name: --quiet
options.description: (optional) Don't show banner or execution time

options.name: --no-beep
options.description: (optional) Don't emit beep when finished

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

commands.name: coreservices
commands.description: Enable/disable LambdaSharp.Core services for all modules in tier

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --enabled
options.description: (optional) Enable LambdaSharp.Core services for all modules

options.name: --disabled
options.description: (optional) Disable LambdaSharp.Core services for all modules

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create new LambdaSharp module, function, app, or resource

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --working-directory
options.description: (optional) Module directory (default: current directory)

options.name: --input
options.description: (optional) File path to YAML module definition (default: Module.yml)

options.name: --no-ansi
options.description: (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output

options.name: --verbose
options.description: (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)

options.name: --quiet
options.description: (optional) Don't show banner or execution time

options.name: --no-beep
options.description: (optional) Don't emit beep when finished

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --namespace
options.description: (optional) Root namespace for project (default: same as function name)

options.name: --working-directory
options.description: (optional) New function project parent directory (default: current directory)

options.name: --framework
options.description: (optional) Target .NET framework (default: 'net6.0')

options.name: --language
options.description: (optional) Select programming language for generated code (default: csharp)

options.name: --input
options.description: (optional) File path to YAML module definition (default: Module.yml)

options.name: --type
options.description: (optional) Function type (one of: apigateway, apigatewayproxy, customresource, event, finalizer, generic, queue, schedule, selfcontained, topic, websocket, websocketproxy; default: prompt)

options.name: --timeout
options.description: (optional) Function timeout in seconds (default: 30)

options.name: --memory
options.description: (optional) Function memory in megabytes (default: 1769)

options.name: --no-ansi
options.description: (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output

options.name: --verbose
options.description: (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)

options.name: --quiet
options.description: (optional) Don't show banner or execution time

options.name: --no-beep
options.description: (optional) Don't emit beep when finished

commands.name: expiring-bucket
commands.description: Create an S3 bucket that self-deletes after expiration

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --aws-profile
options.description: (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file

options.name: --aws-region
options.description: (optional) Use a specific AWS region (default: read from AWS profile)

options.name: --expiration-in-days
options.description: (optional) Number of days until the bucket expires and is deleted (default: 7 days)

options.name: --no-ansi
options.description: (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output

options.name: --verbose
options.description: (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)

options.name: --quiet
options.description: (optional) Don't show banner or execution time

options.name: --no-beep
options.description: (optional) Don't emit beep when finished

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --no-assembly-validation
options.description: (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp assemblies

options.name: --no-dependency-validation
options.description: (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp module dependencies

options.name: --configuration
options.description: (optional) Build configuration for function projects (default: "Release")

options.name: --git-sha
options.description: (optional) Git SHA of most recent git commit (default: invoke 'git rev-parse HEAD' command)

options.name: --git-branch
options.description: (optional) Git branch name (default: invoke 'git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD' command)

options.name: --output
options.description: (optional) Path to output directory (default: bin)

options.name: --selector
options.description: (optional) Selector for resolving conditional compilation choices in module

options.name: --cfn-output
options.description: (optional) Output location for generated CloudFormation template file (default: bin/cloudformation.json)

options.name: --module-version
options.description: (optional) Override the module version

options.name: --module-build-date
options.description: (optional) Override module build date [yyyyMMddHHmmss]

options.name: --force-build
options.description: (optional) Always build function packages

options.name: --force-refresh
options.description: (optional) Always refresh manifests from their origin

options.name: --build-policy
options.description: (optional) Provide build policy document file path

options.name: --dryrun
options.description: (optional) Generate output artifacts without deploying (0=everything, 1=cloudformation)

options.description: (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)

arguments.name: VALUE
arguments.description: (optional) Path to module or artifacts folder (default: Module.yml)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --name
options.description: (optional) Specify an alternative module name for the deployment (default: module name)

options.name: --parameters
options.description: (optional) Specify source filename for module parameters (default: none)

options.name: --allow-data-loss
options.description: (optional) Allow CloudFormation resource update operations that could lead to data loss

options.name: --protect
options.description: (optional) Enable termination protection for the deployed module

options.name: --xray
options.description: (optional) Enable service-call tracing with AWS X-Ray for all resources in module  (0=Disabled, 1=RootModule, 2=AllModules; RootModule if LEVEL is omitted)

options.name: --force-deploy
options.description: (optional) Force module deployment

options.name: --prompt-all
options.description: (optional) Prompt for all missing parameters values (default: only prompt for missing parameters with no default value)

options.name: --no-import
options.description: (optional) All module artifacts must exist in deployment tier bucket and cannot be imported

options.name: --no-dependency-upgrades
options.description: (optional) Do not automatically upgrade shared dependencies

options.name: --force-publish
options.description: (optional) Publish modules and their artifacts even when no changes were detected

options.name: --module-origin
options.description: (optional) Set alternative module origin when publishing

options.description: (optional) Use specified S3 bucket to import module from instead of module origin
